questions.question: Explain the purpose of a Certificate Authority (CA) in the public-key management process. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the role of a CA in issuing digital certificates

questions.question: Compare and contrast the traditional certificate lifecycle with a web-based certificate lifecycle. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Outline key differences between the two approaches

questions.question: Describe an alternative approach to public-key management, such as a hybrid model that combines traditional key management with another method. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Provide an example of a hybrid approach
